display: create a notebook `xiaomi :: ax3000t :: docs` with entirely documentation about `Xiaomi Router AX3000T` then make a entirely deep research about best practices configuration with 3 in the same home, what the best configuration for this 3 pieces go into reddit, quora, discord then create a entirely studio
https://github.com/PleasePrompto/notebooklm-skill help me to install this skill

Use the notebooklm skill to perform iterative deep research on a NotebookLM
I just prepared. Notebook URL: https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/6066354e-2821-4fb3-8592-a6d8f238ede2

Workflow:

1. Check auth status. If not authenticated, run auth_manager.py setup and
   tell me to log in.

2. Smart-add the notebook to my library:
   - First query: "What is the content of this notebook? What topics are
     covered? Provide a complete overview briefly and concisely."
   - Then add it with:
     --name "Xiaomi AX3000T Docs"
     --description "<derived from the discovery query>"
     --topics "xiaomi,ax3000t,router,mesh,wifi6,openwrt,home-networking"
   - Activate it.

3. Run a structured research pass on optimal configuration for THREE
   AX3000T units in a single home, asking ONE question per call and
   following up only when there's a real gap. Budget: max 15 queries
   total (rate limit is 50/day, leave headroom).

   Ask in this order, treating each as independent (each call has no
   memory of previous calls — include context in every question):

   Q1. "For three Xiaomi AX3000T routers deployed as a mesh in one home,
   what does the documentation recommend for topology: wired Ethernet
   backhaul vs wireless backhaul, star vs daisy-chain, and physical
   placement of the three nodes (gateway/mid/edge)?"

   Q2. "For a 3-node Xiaomi AX3000T mesh, what are the recommended 5 GHz
   channel width settings (20/40/80/160 MHz), DFS channel usage, and
   channel selection strategy?"

   Q3. "For a 3-node Xiaomi AX3000T mesh, what are the recommended 2.4 GHz
   configuration, transmit power levels, and band-steering / smart-
   connect / 802.11k/v/r fast-roaming settings?"

   Q4. "On Xiaomi AX3000T, compare stock MiWiFi firmware vs OpenWrt for a
   3-node mesh: stability, feature parity, mesh support, and which
   firmware version is currently recommended."

   Q5. "For a Xiaomi AX3000T mesh, what is the recommended security
   configuration: WPA3 vs WPA2/WPA3 mixed, PMF, guest network
   isolation, IoT VLAN segmentation, and firmware update policy?"

   Q6. "For a 3-node Xiaomi AX3000T mesh, what QoS, IPv6, DNS (local
   resolver, DoH/DoT), and hardware NAT / flow-offloading settings
   are recommended?"

   Q7. "What are the most commonly reported bugs and issues with the
   Xiaomi AX3000T in mesh mode, and what are the documented
   workarounds, reset procedures, and re-pairing steps?"

   Q8. "Across all sources in this notebook, where do official Xiaomi
   documentation and community sources (Reddit/Quora/forums)
   DISAGREE about AX3000T mesh configuration, and which view has
   stronger evidence?"

4. After each answer, when you see "Is that ALL you need to know?",
   evaluate: if the answer cited specific values/settings with sources,
   move on. If it was vague or contradictory, ask ONE focused follow-up
   only.

5. After all questions, synthesize a single markdown report with sections
   matching Q1–Q8, with citations to which source(s) supported each
   recommendation. Flag any UNVERIFIED claim. Save it to
   ~/Documents/ax3000t-mesh-research.md (or print it if outside that path).

Constraints:

- Each question is stateless — restate context in every question.
- Do NOT ask more than 2 follow-ups per main question.
- Stop and tell me if you hit the rate limit.
activate YOLO mode end stop only when finished
